I helped the Curator investigate some strange new phenomena on Anachronia.
I tracked down Kerapac and foiled his plot to destroy Gielinor. He has now fallen back under Jas's control, bound to the Needle this time.
I may have accidentally helped a dragonkin take control of an elder artefact, endangering all life on Gielinor. Oops.
I killed 7 Giant Arch-Glacors, from the plane of Leng.
I have bought the Rapid Renewal prayer for 38000 dungeoneering tokens.
